summary: ThreeDScene: 6000-step Euler-integrated Lorenz trajectory with σ=10, ρ=28, β=8/3 starting at (0.1, 0, 0). ValueTracker t_tr progressively reveals the BLUE butterfly trail + YELLOW rider via always_redraw. Ambient camera rotation emphasizes 3D structure. Fixed-frame panel has t, (x,y,z), parameters.
